address: 1200 E Main St, Suite 200, Richmond, VA 23219

hero.headline: Building Stronger Communities Together.
hero.subheadline: Riverbank Community Foundation invests in education, housing, and workforce development across Central Virginia.

testimonials.quote: Riverbank helped our family find stable housing and a path forward.
testimonials.author: Program Participant

testimonials.quote: A transparent, well-run organization that delivers real impact.
testimonials.author: Corporate Donor

about.intro: Riverbank Community Foundation was established in 2005 to address systemic barriers to opportunity in Central Virginia. We fund programs in education, affordable housing, and workforce readiness.

team.name: Dr. Angela Morris
team.title: Executive Director
team.bio: 20 years in nonprofit leadership and community development.

list.title: Education Access Initiative
list.description: After-school tutoring, mentorship, and college readiness programs.

list.title: Housing Stability Program
list.description: Emergency rental assistance and transitional housing support.

list.title: Workforce Ready
list.description: Job training, certification programs, and employer partnerships.

donate.headline: Your Support Creates Lasting Change
donate.subheadline: Every dollar invested strengthens families and communities across Central Virginia.

tiers.label: Supporter
tiers.impact: Provides school supplies for one student.

tiers.label: Advocate
tiers.impact: Funds one week of after-school tutoring.

tiers.label: Champion
tiers.impact: Covers emergency rental assistance for one family.

contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.subheading: Questions about programs, volunteering, or partnerships? We would be glad to hear from you.
